news.title: Genenta signs Definitive Agreements with Sophia High Tech
Genenta, evolving into Saentra Forge, has signed a Binding Offer with Sòphia High Tech, an Italian company manufacturing critical parts for Europe's space and defense programs
Genenta, evolving into Saentra Forge, continues to evaluate strategic options for its original biotechnology platform derived from the research of Professor Luigi Naldini
